TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Andris Biedriņš sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 4, Andris Biedriņš, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Emīls ga, la'iy ni Biedriņš. mintzyuwaw nya Andris Biedriņš sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2004, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: an*ris~ɕ βie*ri** s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, an*ris~ɕ βie*ri**, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja em*ls~ɕ ɣa, laʔij ni βie*ri**. mintzjuwaw nja an*ris~ɕ βie*ri** s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Andris Biedriņš sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 4, Andris Biedriņš, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Emīls ga, la'iy ni Biedriņš. mintzyuwaw nya Andris Biedriņš sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2004, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: an*ris~ɕ βie*ri** s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, an*ris~ɕ βie*ri**, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja em*ls~ɕ ɣa, laʔij ni βie*ri**. mintzjuwaw nja an*ris~ɕ βie*ri** s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
